name: better-code-review-graph
description: Knowledge graph for token-efficient code reviews -- semantic search and call-graph resolution across your codebase.

EMBEDDING_MODELS.title: Embedding model chain (optional)
EMBEDDING_MODELS.description: CSV 'provider/model,provider/model' (order = litellm fallback); provider inferred from prefix. Empty = local ONNX (qwen3-embed). Example: jina_ai/jina-embeddings-v5-text-small,gemini/gemini-embedding-001

SUMMARY_MODELS.title: Summarizer model chain (optional)
SUMMARY_MODELS.description: CSV 'provider/model,...' for the graph summarize action; provider inferred from prefix. Empty = summaries disabled. Chat-completion providers only (gemini/openai). Example: gemini/gemini-2.5-flash,openai/gpt-4o-mini

JINA_AI_API_KEY.title: Jina AI API key (optional)
JINA_AI_API_KEY.description: Enables jina_ai/ embedding models referenced in EMBEDDING_MODELS. Without any cloud key the server uses local ONNX. https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/

GEMINI_API_KEY.title: Gemini API key (optional)
GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Enables gemini/ models referenced in EMBEDDING_MODELS / SUMMARY_MODELS. Free tier available. https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI API key (optional)
OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Enables openai/ models referenced in EMBEDDING_MODELS / SUMMARY_MODELS. https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

COHERE_API_KEY.title: Cohere API key (optional)
COHERE_API_KEY.description: Enables cohere/ embedding models referenced in EMBEDDING_MODELS. https://dashboard.cohere.com/api-keys
